8!
records.m_Talk_DEU:

8!
records.m_Talk_FRA:

8 8
8!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh? Struggling quite a bit for a lowly mortal, aren't you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh? Struggling quite a bit for a lowly mortal, aren't you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh? Struggling quite a bit for a lowly mortal, aren't you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: But it's all just meaningless resistance.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But it's all just meaningless resistance.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But it's all just meaningless resistance.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Get up, sisters of the Queen!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Get up, sisters of the Queen!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Get up, sisters of the Queen!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tch... Controlling Shadows really is a damn nuisance!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tch... Controlling Shadows really is a damn nuisance!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tch... Controlling Shadows really is a damn nuisance!

records.m_Talk_ENG: No time to hesitate... If we don't close the distance, we're at a serious disadvantage...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: No time to hesitate... If we don't close the distance, we're at a serious disadvantage...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: No time to hesitate... If we don't close the distance, we're at a serious disadvantage...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: All units, focus fire on the Apostle's Shadows!
records.m_Talk_DEU: All units, focus fire on the Apostle's Shadows!
records.m_Talk_FRA: All units, focus fire on the Apostle's Shadows!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Give the Colonel everything you've got and clear a path to the Apostle!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Give the Colonel everything you've got and clear a path to the Apostle!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Give the Colonel everything you've got and clear a path to the Apostle!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now's our chance! Aki! I'll clear the path!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now's our chance! Aki! I'll clear the path!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now's our chance! Aki! I'll clear the path!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haaaaaah! Buster!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haaaaaah! Buster!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haaaaaah! Buster!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Insolent mortal.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Insolent mortal.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Insolent mortal.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You think such a feeble strike could reach me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You think such a feeble strike could reach me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You think such a feeble strike could reach me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh yeah? Then how about this...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh yeah? Then how about this...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh yeah? Then how about this...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, I knew you were aiming for an ambush.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, I knew you were aiming for an ambush.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, I knew you were aiming for an ambush.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But haven't I told you already? It's all just meaningless resistance.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But haven't I told you already? It's all just meaningless resistance.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But haven't I told you already? It's all just meaningless resistance.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The moment you crossed blades with me head-on, your defeat was sealed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The moment you crossed blades with me head-on, your defeat was sealed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The moment you crossed blades with me head-on, your defeat was sealed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh...! I couldn't care less about swordfights...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh...! I couldn't care less about swordfights...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh...! I couldn't care less about swordfights...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You can't maintain guard against my attacks anyways...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You can't maintain guard against my attacks anyways...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You can't maintain guard against my attacks anyways...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh...? Why is your sword so heavy...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh...? Why is your sword so heavy...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh...? Why is your sword so heavy...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Here comes a fatal blow! Ultra Heavy Sword 5000x!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Here comes a fatal blow! Ultra Heavy Sword 5000x!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Here comes a fatal blow! Ultra Heavy Sword 5000x!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haaaaaaaaah...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haaaaaaaaah...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haaaaaaaaah...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now! You insufferable GI...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now! You insufferable GI...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now! You insufferable GI...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: How dare you bring me down to the ground! You insolent...
records.m_Talk_DEU: How dare you bring me down to the ground! You insolent...
records.m_Talk_FRA: How dare you bring me down to the ground! You insolent...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Impressive. Flawless positioning, lady.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Impressive. Flawless positioning, lady.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Impressive. Flawless positioning, lady.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The revenge match ends in victory for humanity, Apostle.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The revenge match ends in victory for humanity, Apostle.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The revenge match ends in victory for humanity, Apostle.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, AAAAAAHHH...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, AAAAAAHHH...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, AAAAAAHHH...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Phew. Did we get rid of her...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Phew. Did we get rid of her...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Phew. Did we get rid of her...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aaah!! Ms. Hirose, did you hear that just now?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aaah!! Ms. Hirose, did you hear that just now?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aaah!! Ms. Hirose, did you hear that just now?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That ruthless GI... just foreshadowed her resurrection!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That ruthless GI... just foreshadowed her resurrection!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That ruthless GI... just foreshadowed her resurrection!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Get up, warrior! At this rate, the Apostle's gonna revive!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Get up, warrior! At this rate, the Apostle's gonna revive!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Get up, warrior! At this rate, the Apostle's gonna revive!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ms. Hirose...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ms. Hirose...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ms. Hirose...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha... This is a joke, right...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha... This is a joke, right...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha... This is a joke, right...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Come on, get up... Say something, like you always do...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Come on, get up... Say something, like you always do...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Come on, get up... Say something, like you always do...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Please...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please...

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is unexpected. We're looking at a completely different outcome than before.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is unexpected. We're looking at a completely different outcome than before.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is unexpected. We're looking at a completely different outcome than before.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I never thought Hirose Aki would push Thagirion's Apostle this far.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I never thought Hirose Aki would push Thagirion's Apostle this far.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I never thought Hirose Aki would push Thagirion's Apostle this far.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...You are?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...You are?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...You are?

records.m_Talk_ENG: But an Apostle is immortal. Without using a specific method or meeting a condition, they can't be truly destroyed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But an Apostle is immortal. Without using a specific method or meeting a condition, they can't be truly destroyed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But an Apostle is immortal. Without using a specific method or meeting a condition, they can't be truly destroyed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Who's that...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Who's that...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Who's that...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well now, this is a surprise. Didn't expect to see a beauty like you show up in the middle of a battlefield.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well now, this is a surprise. Didn't expect to see a beauty like you show up in the middle of a battlefield.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well now, this is a surprise. Didn't expect to see a beauty like you show up in the middle of a battlefield.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're no civilian, that's for sure... I hope you're a Counter sent by the Administration.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're no civilian, that's for sure... I hope you're a Counter sent by the Administration.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're no civilian, that's for sure... I hope you're a Counter sent by the Administration.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Administration... They're not coming.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Administration... They're not coming.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Administration... They're not coming.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because I wrote the script that way.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because I wrote the script that way.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because I wrote the script that way.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Script? You talk like you know how this all plays out.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Script? You talk like you know how this all plays out.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Script? You talk like you know how this all plays out.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So? If you're not backup from the Administration, then who are you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So? If you're not backup from the Administration, then who are you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So? If you're not backup from the Administration, then who are you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well... I wear quite a few masks, you see...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well... I wear quite a few masks, you see...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well... I wear quite a few masks, you see...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But for now... yes, Colonel Jake Walker, I think you've guessed correctly.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But for now... yes, Colonel Jake Walker, I think you've guessed correctly.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But for now... yes, Colonel Jake Walker, I think you've guessed correctly.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've stepped onto this stage fully prepared to shatter your entire world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've stepped onto this stage fully prepared to shatter your entire world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've stepped onto this stage fully prepared to shatter your entire world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...As the Apostle of the Ignorant Monarch.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...As the Apostle of the Ignorant Monarch.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...As the Apostle of the Ignorant Monarch.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kyle... Where is he?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kyle... Where is he?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kyle... Where is he?

records.m_Talk_ENG: He's... dead.
records.m_Talk_DEU: He's... dead.
records.m_Talk_FRA: He's... dead.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What about Sylvia?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What about Sylvia?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What about Sylvia?

records.m_Talk_ENG: She's dead, too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She's dead, too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She's dead, too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But we've still got Colonel Jake, the ace up our sleeve. He won't let them pass easily.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But we've still got Colonel Jake, the ace up our sleeve. He won't let them pass easily.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But we've still got Colonel Jake, the ace up our sleeve. He won't let them pass easily.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I knew he'd be so useful, I would have drilled him harder when he was a recruit. Hah hah.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I knew he'd be so useful, I would have drilled him harder when he was a recruit. Hah hah.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I knew he'd be so useful, I would have drilled him harder when he was a recruit. Hah hah.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now that you're awake, you should head out to the underground passageway.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now that you're awake, you should head out to the underground passageway.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now that you're awake, you should head out to the underground passageway.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you're lucky, you can get to the nearby bunker without incident.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you're lucky, you can get to the nearby bunker without incident.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you're lucky, you can get to the nearby bunker without incident.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, I'm not going.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, I'm not going.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, I'm not going.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Commander?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Commander?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Commander?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm getting old.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm getting old.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm getting old.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I should have made up my mind earlier, but... I was probably too scared.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I should have made up my mind earlier, but... I was probably too scared.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I should have made up my mind earlier, but... I was probably too scared.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are you talking about?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are you talking about?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are you talking about?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That plan of yours. You said you need one more test subject to realize it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That plan of yours. You said you need one more test subject to realize it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That plan of yours. You said you need one more test subject to realize it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No!
records.m_Talk_DEU: No!
records.m_Talk_FRA: No!

records.m_Talk_ENG: My body can't handle any more fighting.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My body can't handle any more fighting.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My body can't handle any more fighting.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But it still can contribute to the test for mankind.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But it still can contribute to the test for mankind.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But it still can contribute to the test for mankind.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Project Terraside is not complete!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Project Terraside is not complete!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Project Terraside is not complete!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even with your help, there's no guarantee that it can save the remaining population.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even with your help, there's no guarantee that it can save the remaining population.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even with your help, there's no guarantee that it can save the remaining population.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I know, and I'm fine with that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I know, and I'm fine with that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I know, and I'm fine with that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's okay, Dominic. You don't have to be responsible for everything.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's okay, Dominic. You don't have to be responsible for everything.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's okay, Dominic. You don't have to be responsible for everything.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's just do the best we can,
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's just do the best we can,
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's just do the best we can,

records.m_Talk_ENG: and leave the rest to the next ones.
records.m_Talk_DEU: and leave the rest to the next ones.
records.m_Talk_FRA: and leave the rest to the next ones.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just like our predecessors did.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just like our predecessors did.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just like our predecessors did.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I knew better, I would have collaborated with the Administration earlier. And if I did...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I knew better, I would have collaborated with the Administration earlier. And if I did...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I knew better, I would have collaborated with the Administration earlier. And if I did...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't trust it too much, Dominic.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't trust it too much, Dominic.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't trust it too much, Dominic.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sure, it's fighting for humanity just like us,
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sure, it's fighting for humanity just like us,
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sure, it's fighting for humanity just like us,

records.m_Talk_ENG: but I have a feeling that it also has a hidden agenda.
records.m_Talk_DEU: but I have a feeling that it also has a hidden agenda.
records.m_Talk_FRA: but I have a feeling that it also has a hidden agenda.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, my eyes are blurry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, my eyes are blurry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, my eyes are blurry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Could you help me move?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Could you help me move?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Could you help me move?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, ma'am.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, ma'am.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, ma'am.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh! What's with this shaking...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh! What's with this shaking...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh! What's with this shaking...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is the enemy already hitting HQ...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is the enemy already hitting HQ...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is the enemy already hitting HQ...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That sound isn't coming from outside... The vibration feels different...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That sound isn't coming from outside... The vibration feels different...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That sound isn't coming from outside... The vibration feels different...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's definitely coming from below... from underground...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's definitely coming from below... from underground...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's definitely coming from below... from underground...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then that means... there's a C.O. down there...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then that means... there's a C.O. down there...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then that means... there's a C.O. down there...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Damn it! At this rate, the whole place is gonna collapse!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Damn it! At this rate, the whole place is gonna collapse!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Damn it! At this rate, the whole place is gonna collapse!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What is going on?! Gonna have to get out of here!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What is going on?! Gonna have to get out of here!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What is going on?! Gonna have to get out of here!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
*Huff* *Huff* *Huff
8v!*
records.m_Talk_DEU:
*Huff* *Huff* *Huff
8v!*
records.m_Talk_FRA:
*Huff* *Huff* *Huff
8v!*

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Shucks, I can't breathe right with this injury
8v
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Shucks, I can't breathe right with this injury
8v
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Shucks, I can't breathe right with this injury
8v

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What on earth is that...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What on earth is that...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What on earth is that...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It destroyed the HQ building and... Isn't that a C.O. inside...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: It destroyed the HQ building and... Isn't that a C.O. inside...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: It destroyed the HQ building and... Isn't that a C.O. inside...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: An angel...? I've never seen a C.O. like that before...
records.m_Talk_DEU: An angel...? I've never seen a C.O. like that before...
records.m_Talk_FRA: An angel...? I've never seen a C.O. like that before...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Those damn GIs... So this is what they've been hiding away in the base all this time...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Those damn GIs... So this is what they've been hiding away in the base all this time...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Those damn GIs... So this is what they've been hiding away in the base all this time...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What the hell have they done...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What the hell have they done...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What the hell have they done...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's going to happen now...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's going to happen now...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's going to happen now...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everything according to the script.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everything according to the script.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everything according to the script.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
They are the result of the Terraside Project
8v
records.m_Talk_DEU:
They are the result of the Terraside Project
8v
records.m_Talk_FRA:
They are the result of the Terraside Project
8v

records.m_Talk_ENG: But their <color=#ffd34c>Ultimate Mutation Factor</color> is nothing more than a residue of the Divinity.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But their <color=#ffd34c>Ultimate Mutation Factor</color> is nothing more than a residue of the Divinity.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But their <color=#ffd34c>Ultimate Mutation Factor</color> is nothing more than a residue of the Divinity.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In the end, it seems that transplanting that residue into a human body only leads to one thing... turning into a grotesque C.O.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In the end, it seems that transplanting that residue into a human body only leads to one thing... turning into a grotesque C.O.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In the end, it seems that transplanting that residue into a human body only leads to one thing... turning into a grotesque C.O.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course, they probably still see it as humanity's last hope.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course, they probably still see it as humanity's last hope.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course, they probably still see it as humanity's last hope.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Nothing changed. No variables.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nothing changed. No variables.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Nothing changed. No variables.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In the end... no angel appeared in this world either.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In the end... no angel appeared in this world either.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In the end... no angel appeared in this world either.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Insolent mortal.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, I knew you were aiming for an ambush.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, I knew you were aiming for an ambush.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But haven't I told you already? It's all just meaningless resistance.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But haven't I told you already? It's all just meaningless resistance.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But haven't I told you already? It's all just meaningless resistance.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The moment you crossed blades with me head-on, your defeat was sealed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The moment you crossed blades with me head-on, your defeat was sealed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The moment you crossed blades with me head-on, your defeat was sealed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh...! I couldn't care less about swordfights...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh...! I couldn't care less about swordfights...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh...! I couldn't care less about swordfights...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You can't maintain guard against my attacks anyways...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You can't maintain guard against my attacks anyways...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You can't maintain guard against my attacks anyways...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh...? Why is your sword so heavy...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh...? Why is your sword so heavy...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh...? Why is your sword so heavy...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Here comes a fatal blow! Ultra Heavy Sword 5000x!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Here comes a fatal blow! Ultra Heavy Sword 5000x!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Here comes a fatal blow! Ultra Heavy Sword 5000x!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haaaaaaaaah...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haaaaaaaaah...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haaaaaaaaah...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now! You insufferable GI...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now! You insufferable GI...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now! You insufferable GI...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: How dare you bring me down to the ground! You insolent...
root.m_Talk_DEU: How dare you bring me down to the ground! You insolent...
root.m_Talk_FRA: How dare you bring me down to the ground! You insolent...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Impressive. Flawless positioning, lady.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Impressive. Flawless positioning, lady.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Impressive. Flawless positioning, lady.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And...
root.m_Talk_DEU: And...
root.m_Talk_FRA: And...

root.m_Talk_ENG: The revenge match ends in victory for humanity, Apostle.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The revenge match ends in victory for humanity, Apostle.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The revenge match ends in victory for humanity, Apostle.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, AAAAAAHHH...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, AAAAAAHHH...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, AAAAAAHHH...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Phew. Did we get rid of her...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Phew. Did we get rid of her...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Phew. Did we get rid of her...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Aaah!! Ms. Hirose, did you hear that just now?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Aaah!! Ms. Hirose, did you hear that just now?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Aaah!! Ms. Hirose, did you hear that just now?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That ruthless GI... just foreshadowed her resurrection!
root.m_Talk_DEU: That ruthless GI... just foreshadowed her resurrection!
root.m_Talk_FRA: That ruthless GI... just foreshadowed her resurrection!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Get up, warrior! At this rate, the Apostle's gonna revive!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Get up, warrior! At this rate, the Apostle's gonna revive!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Get up, warrior! At this rate, the Apostle's gonna revive!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ms. Hirose...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ms. Hirose...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ms. Hirose...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha... This is a joke, right...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha... This is a joke, right...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha... This is a joke, right...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Come on, get up... Say something, like you always do...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Come on, get up... Say something, like you always do...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Come on, get up... Say something, like you always do...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Please...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Please...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Please...

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is unexpected. We're looking at a completely different outcome than before.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is unexpected. We're looking at a completely different outcome than before.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is unexpected. We're looking at a completely different outcome than before.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I never thought Hirose Aki would push Thagirion's Apostle this far.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I never thought Hirose Aki would push Thagirion's Apostle this far.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I never thought Hirose Aki would push Thagirion's Apostle this far.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...You are?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...You are?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...You are?

root.m_Talk_ENG: But an Apostle is immortal. Without using a specific method or meeting a condition, they can't be truly destroyed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But an Apostle is immortal. Without using a specific method or meeting a condition, they can't be truly destroyed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But an Apostle is immortal. Without using a specific method or meeting a condition, they can't be truly destroyed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Who's that...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Who's that...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Who's that...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well now, this is a surprise. Didn't expect to see a beauty like you show up in the middle of a battlefield.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well now, this is a surprise. Didn't expect to see a beauty like you show up in the middle of a battlefield.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well now, this is a surprise. Didn't expect to see a beauty like you show up in the middle of a battlefield.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're no civilian, that's for sure... I hope you're a Counter sent by the Administration.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're no civilian, that's for sure... I hope you're a Counter sent by the Administration.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're no civilian, that's for sure... I hope you're a Counter sent by the Administration.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Administration... They're not coming.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Administration... They're not coming.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Administration... They're not coming.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because I wrote the script that way.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because I wrote the script that way.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because I wrote the script that way.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Script? You talk like you know how this all plays out.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Script? You talk like you know how this all plays out.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Script? You talk like you know how this all plays out.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So? If you're not backup from the Administration, then who are you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So? If you're not backup from the Administration, then who are you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So? If you're not backup from the Administration, then who are you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well... I wear quite a few masks, you see...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well... I wear quite a few masks, you see...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well... I wear quite a few masks, you see...

root.m_Talk_ENG: But for now... yes, Colonel Jake Walker, I think you've guessed correctly.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But for now... yes, Colonel Jake Walker, I think you've guessed correctly.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But for now... yes, Colonel Jake Walker, I think you've guessed correctly.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I've stepped onto this stage fully prepared to shatter your entire world.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I've stepped onto this stage fully prepared to shatter your entire world.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I've stepped onto this stage fully prepared to shatter your entire world.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...As the Apostle of the Ignorant Monarch.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...As the Apostle of the Ignorant Monarch.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...As the Apostle of the Ignorant Monarch.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kyle... Where is he?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kyle... Where is he?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kyle... Where is he?

root.m_Talk_ENG: He's... dead.
root.m_Talk_DEU: He's... dead.
root.m_Talk_FRA: He's... dead.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What about Sylvia?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What about Sylvia?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What about Sylvia?

root.m_Talk_ENG: She's dead, too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She's dead, too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She's dead, too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But we've still got Colonel Jake, the ace up our sleeve. He won't let them pass easily.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But we've still got Colonel Jake, the ace up our sleeve. He won't let them pass easily.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But we've still got Colonel Jake, the ace up our sleeve. He won't let them pass easily.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If I knew he'd be so useful, I would have drilled him harder when he was a recruit. Hah hah.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If I knew he'd be so useful, I would have drilled him harder when he was a recruit. Hah hah.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If I knew he'd be so useful, I would have drilled him harder when he was a recruit. Hah hah.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now that you're awake, you should head out to the underground passageway.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now that you're awake, you should head out to the underground passageway.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now that you're awake, you should head out to the underground passageway.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you're lucky, you can get to the nearby bunker without incident.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you're lucky, you can get to the nearby bunker without incident.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you're lucky, you can get to the nearby bunker without incident.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No, I'm not going.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No, I'm not going.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No, I'm not going.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Commander?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Commander?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Commander?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm getting old.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm getting old.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm getting old.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I should have made up my mind earlier, but... I was probably too scared.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I should have made up my mind earlier, but... I was probably too scared.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I should have made up my mind earlier, but... I was probably too scared.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What are you talking about?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What are you talking about?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What are you talking about?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That plan of yours. You said you need one more test subject to realize it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That plan of yours. You said you need one more test subject to realize it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That plan of yours. You said you need one more test subject to realize it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No!
root.m_Talk_DEU: No!
root.m_Talk_FRA: No!

root.m_Talk_ENG: My body can't handle any more fighting.
root.m_Talk_DEU: My body can't handle any more fighting.
root.m_Talk_FRA: My body can't handle any more fighting.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But it still can contribute to the test for mankind.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But it still can contribute to the test for mankind.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But it still can contribute to the test for mankind.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Project Terraside is not complete!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Project Terraside is not complete!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Project Terraside is not complete!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even with your help, there's no guarantee that it can save the remaining population.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even with your help, there's no guarantee that it can save the remaining population.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even with your help, there's no guarantee that it can save the remaining population.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I know, and I'm fine with that.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I know, and I'm fine with that.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I know, and I'm fine with that.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's okay, Dominic. You don't have to be responsible for everything.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's okay, Dominic. You don't have to be responsible for everything.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's okay, Dominic. You don't have to be responsible for everything.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Let's just do the best we can,
root.m_Talk_DEU: Let's just do the best we can,
root.m_Talk_FRA: Let's just do the best we can,

root.m_Talk_ENG: and leave the rest to the next ones.
root.m_Talk_DEU: and leave the rest to the next ones.
root.m_Talk_FRA: and leave the rest to the next ones.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just like our predecessors did.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just like our predecessors did.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just like our predecessors did.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If I knew better, I would have collaborated with the Administration earlier. And if I did...
root.m_Talk_DEU: If I knew better, I would have collaborated with the Administration earlier. And if I did...
root.m_Talk_FRA: If I knew better, I would have collaborated with the Administration earlier. And if I did...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't trust it too much, Dominic.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't trust it too much, Dominic.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't trust it too much, Dominic.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sure, it's fighting for humanity just like us,
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sure, it's fighting for humanity just like us,
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sure, it's fighting for humanity just like us,

root.m_Talk_ENG: but I have a feeling that it also has a hidden agenda.
root.m_Talk_DEU: but I have a feeling that it also has a hidden agenda.
root.m_Talk_FRA: but I have a feeling that it also has a hidden agenda.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now, my eyes are blurry.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now, my eyes are blurry.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now, my eyes are blurry.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Could you help me move?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Could you help me move?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Could you help me move?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, ma'am.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, ma'am.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, ma'am.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh! What's with this shaking...?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh! What's with this shaking...?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh! What's with this shaking...?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is the enemy already hitting HQ...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is the enemy already hitting HQ...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is the enemy already hitting HQ...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That sound isn't coming from outside... The vibration feels different...
root.m_Talk_DEU: That sound isn't coming from outside... The vibration feels different...
root.m_Talk_FRA: That sound isn't coming from outside... The vibration feels different...

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's definitely coming from below... from underground...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's definitely coming from below... from underground...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's definitely coming from below... from underground...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then that means... there's a C.O. down there...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then that means... there's a C.O. down there...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then that means... there's a C.O. down there...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Damn it! At this rate, the whole place is gonna collapse!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Damn it! At this rate, the whole place is gonna collapse!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Damn it! At this rate, the whole place is gonna collapse!

root.m_Talk_ENG: What is going on?! Gonna have to get out of here!
root.m_Talk_DEU: What is going on?! Gonna have to get out of here!
root.m_Talk_FRA: What is going on?! Gonna have to get out of here!

root.m_Talk_ENG:
*Huff* *Huff* *Huff
8v!*
root.m_Talk_DEU:
*Huff* *Huff* *Huff
8v!*
root.m_Talk_FRA:
*Huff* *Huff* *Huff
8v!*

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Shucks, I can't breathe right with this injury
8v
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Shucks, I can't breathe right with this injury
8v
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Shucks, I can't breathe right with this injury
8v

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What on earth is that...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What on earth is that...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What on earth is that...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It destroyed the HQ building and... Isn't that a C.O. inside...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: It destroyed the HQ building and... Isn't that a C.O. inside...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: It destroyed the HQ building and... Isn't that a C.O. inside...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: An angel...? I've never seen a C.O. like that before...
root.m_Talk_DEU: An angel...? I've never seen a C.O. like that before...
root.m_Talk_FRA: An angel...? I've never seen a C.O. like that before...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Those damn GIs... So this is what they've been hiding away in the base all this time...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Those damn GIs... So this is what they've been hiding away in the base all this time...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Those damn GIs... So this is what they've been hiding away in the base all this time...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What the hell have they done...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What the hell have they done...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What the hell have they done...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What's going to happen now...?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: What's going to happen now...?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: What's going to happen now...?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Everything according to the script.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Everything according to the script.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Everything according to the script.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
They are the result of the Terraside Project
8v
root.m_Talk_DEU:
They are the result of the Terraside Project
8v
root.m_Talk_FRA:
They are the result of the Terraside Project
8v

root.m_Talk_ENG: But their <color=#ffd34c>Ultimate Mutation Factor</color> is nothing more than a residue of the Divinity.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But their <color=#ffd34c>Ultimate Mutation Factor</color> is nothing more than a residue of the Divinity.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But their <color=#ffd34c>Ultimate Mutation Factor</color> is nothing more than a residue of the Divinity.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In the end, it seems that transplanting that residue into a human body only leads to one thing... turning into a grotesque C.O.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In the end, it seems that transplanting that residue into a human body only leads to one thing... turning into a grotesque C.O.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In the end, it seems that transplanting that residue into a human body only leads to one thing... turning into a grotesque C.O.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of course, they probably still see it as humanity's last hope.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of course, they probably still see it as humanity's last hope.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course, they probably still see it as humanity's last hope.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Nothing changed. No variables.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Nothing changed. No variables.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Nothing changed. No variables.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In the end... no angel appeared in this world either.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In the end... no angel appeared in this world either.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In the end... no angel appeared in this world either.
